    1. RefractiveMaterial(Color, double, double, double, double)

Klasse RefractiveMaterial

java.lang.Object
raytracer.Material
raytracer.RefractiveMaterial
public class RefractiveMaterial extends Material
Represents a refractive material that extends the base material. It adds the transmissive and refractive index property.

  • Felddetails

    • kTransmissive

      public final double kTransmissive

    • refractiveIndex

      public final double refractiveIndex

  • Konstruktordetails

    • RefractiveMaterial

      public RefractiveMaterial(Color kDiffuse, double kSpecular, double shininess, double kTransmissive, double refractiveIndex)
      Creates a new refractive material.
      Parameter:
      kDiffuse - the diffuse color of the material.
      kSpecular - the intensity of the specular lighting.
      shininess - the highlight rolloff of the specular lighting.
      kTransmissive - the transmissive value (how transparent is the object).
      refractiveIndex - the refractive index (how much does the lightray is bend).
